title: Agent for service of process
doc_html:
§4077.1.  Agent for service of process

The agent for service of process of any legal papers served on the board shall be the executive director of the board or the special counsel appointed pursuant to R.S. 33:4077.

Acts 1988, No. 155, §1, eff. June 29, 1988.

§4077.1.  Agent for service of process
The agent for service of process of any legal papers served on the board shall be the executive director of the board or the special counsel appointed pursuant to R.S. 33:4077.
Acts 1988, No. 155, §1, eff. June 29, 1988.
